content.en:
In a flash, another period of time passed.

At this time, Ye Tian obtained some sword-shaped crystals again, and the harvest was already huge, and he was not ready to continue exploring.

There may be other benefits, but there is no need to continue exploring, otherwise he will really grab resources from other peak ancient demon-level powerhouses, he will not have any advantages, and maybe he will offend the peak ancient demon-level powerhouses of the main department of Ah Luo.

In the years that followed, he honestly stayed in that sword mountain and contemplated.

It wasn't until a long time later that this sword mountain didn't help him much, so he chose to leave.

Wow!

Outside of the shattered space-time bubble, Ye Tian appeared here, and then met the Aromu Ancient Demon.

"I've seen Lord Aromu Ancient Demon, I want to return to the Abyss of Aromu!"

Ye Tian said.

"Yes, but I won't send you back, I will give you a force that will keep you going until you return to the Abyss of Arromu. Aromu said.

After all, he needed to watch here, in case there were other Ultimate Ancient Demons from the main department making trouble, it would not be good.

Therefore, he would not send Ye Tian back.

"Thank you, Lord Aromu!"

Ye Tian thanked.

Airplanes!!!!

A force was blessed on Ye Tian's body from the body of the Aromu Ancient Demon 823, causing him to ignore the endless time and space line.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian returned from the depths of the endless space-time line, and only returned to the Abyss of Aromu after a long time, and he did not encounter any trouble during this period.

After returning, Ye Tian stayed in the dojo of the Eagle Department and began to retreat.

After the retreat, he took out the sword-shaped crystal and used it to comprehend the ultimate rules of the sword extreme.

With Ye Tian's ability and comprehension, he comprehends the ultimate rules of the Sword Extreme Dao extremely quickly, and there are many means to increase his comprehension and analysis, and he can even exhaust his physical potential to derive, and the efficiency of comprehension is simply terrifying!

A long time had passed, and Ye Tian's understanding and perception of the ultimate rules of the Sword Extreme Dao had risen to a higher level.

At the same time, he was also trying to create a second Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane, he had a prototype in Sword Mountain before, and now that he had a lot of understanding of the Sword Path Ultimate Rules, he had even more hope of creating a second Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane.

And he also learned about the situation of the shattered space-time bubble, and learned that many top Ancient Demon-level powerhouses had fallen, and even (BDBF) several peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouses had fallen, and many peaking Ancient Demon-level powerhouses had been severely damaged.

However, there are also peak ancient demon-level powerhouses who have obtained huge benefits, and as for what the benefits are, they have not been reported for a while.

But what is certain is that many peak ancient demon-level powerhouses have returned, and only a few peak ancient demon-level powerhouses are still there.

Ye Tian didn't continue to pay attention, even if there were more opportunities in that shattered space-time bubble, he wouldn't go again, and he couldn't go.

In the years that followed, he continued to comprehend, and his strength slowly improved.

After a long time, Ye Tian finally created his second Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane - Extreme Path Ultimate Sword Realm!

This is an extreme ultimate arcane art that combines attack and domain bondage, and can also be used in conjunction with the ultimate rule realm, which can burst out of terrifying attack power, as well as area attacks, and can deal with multiple enemies.

Like at the beginning, if he was able to reach the ultimate sword realm, the Golden Annihilation Ancient Demon would not even be able to escape, even if he had more life-saving things, he would have to fall on the spot.

After that, he fully comprehended the ultimate rules of the Sword Extreme Path.

One after another sword-shaped crystals were consumed by Ye Tian, and with the blessing of the space-time bubble origin crystal, he realized that the ultimate rule of the Extreme Dao of the Sword was stable.

Another period of time has passed.

Ye Tian finally relied on those multiple sword-shaped crystals to successfully comprehend a wisp of the ultimate rule of the Extreme Dao of the Sword, but comprehending this wisp of the ultimate rule of the Extreme Dao of the Sword did not greatly improve his strength for him, but it increased his foundation.

Then, he began to try to fuse this wisp of the Extreme Sword Ultimate Rule with the Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Rule, so as to transform the Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Rule.

If he can comprehend the ultimate rules of the Ten Thousand Laws to the ultimate rules of the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Dao, his strength will truly reach a transformation, which is enough to crush most of the peak ancient demon-level powerhouses.

Of course, this step is extremely difficult and takes an extremely long time.

But Ye Tian is not in a hurry, he has a long time of cultivation, and he can do it early in the evening.

......

Arrow's main department.

Many of the ultimate ancient demons, such as the Aromu Ancient Demon, the Aroye Ancient Demon, the Stygian Ancient Demon, and the Stygian Ancient Demon, are all here.

At this time, the Aromu Ancient Demon took out three fragments, which were almost the same as the ones Ye Tian had obtained.

"The ultimate source crystal of time and space is really broken, if it is complete, then the value is too great!"

The Ancient Demon Path of Aroye. []

"What is the Space-Time Ultimate Source Crystal?" asked the Stygian Ancient Demon, who had just broken through the Ultimate Ancient Demon, curiously.

The Ancient Demon of Aromu smiled and said, "Ancient Demon of Stygian Elegance, the Ultimate Source Crystal of Time and Space is the origin of a space-time bubble, and it is also the most precious item of the space-time bubble, and it will only appear when the space-time bubble is broken. But if the space-time bubble is broken, the space-time ultimate source crystal will also be broken. If you want to obtain a complete space-time ultimate source crystal, it is very difficult to do, after all, our ultimate ancient demon can't even break a space-time bubble, how can it be possible to obtain a complete space-time ultimate source crystal. Of course, the complete space-time ultimate source crystal must exist, we have seen it in a ruin, but unfortunately we didn't get it. As for how that space-time ultimate source crystal appeared, we don't know. "

"Is the Ultimate Source Crystal of Time and Space of Time of Use?"

The Ancient Demon asked.

Aroye Ancient Demon Dao: "It is very useful, first of all, it can be refined, so as to mobilize the power of the origin of the space-time bubble, and the combat effectiveness can be greatly improved, and secondly, you can also understand the ultimate rules of the Extreme Dao, as well as improve the Extreme Dao life pattern, etc., and the ultimate source crystal of time and space can also be used to save your life, there are too many benefits." "

The Ancient Demon of Stygian Elegance is also extremely looking forward to the ultimate source crystal of time and space.

"It's a pity that it's broken, and its value has been reduced dozens of times, I don't want it, I robbed it in the past, I'll give you these few pieces!"

At this time, the Ancient Demon asked the question he wanted to ask.

"The space-time bubble can't be destroyed by the Ultimate Ancient Demon, so how was the space-time bubble destroyed?" asked the Stygian Ancient Demon.

And this question, the ancient demon of Aromu did not hide it, and said it directly.
